subject: Joint Distributions
question: A company is reviewing tornado damage claims under a farm insurance policy. Let $X$ be the portion of a claim representing damage to the house and let $Y$ be the portion of the same claim representing damage to the rest of the property. The joint density function of $X$ and $Y$ is $f_{XY}(x, y) = \begin{cases} 6[1 - (x + y)] & x > 0, y > 0, x + y < 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ Determine the probability that the portion of a claim representing damage to the house is less than 0.2.
